channel.title: GameMaps L4D2 Files
channel.description: RSS feed for GameMaps L4D2 Files.

item.title: [ 5 Maps ] Amid The Ruins
item.description:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 8
A Sequel To Dead South "After spending the night sailing down the savannah river, the survivors wake up to the Captain turning infected causing the boat to crash in Jasper County, with no immediate goal the survivors must venture forward into the unknown." Fight your way though Trailer Parks, Warehouses, Towns And a Power Plant, in this five-chapter Campaign taking place in Jasper County, SC It supports Singleplayer, Co-op, Versus, And Survival. Console Names: atr01_trailer_park atr02_outskirts atr03_town atr04_power_station atr05_plant Credits: Hsyenoh05 - Skybox for chapters 1-3 & 4, TM1566 - Color Correction for chapters 4-5, CastorJudo - Various Metal Textures The Rabbit - Frosted Glass Texture Royal Blood - Radio Song Play Testers - Warhawk, Konsta Starlight
item.content:encoded:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 8
A Sequel To Dead South "After spending the night sailing down the savannah river, the survivors wake up to the Captain turning infected causing the boat to crash in Jasper County, with no immediate goal the survivors must venture forward into the unknown." Fight your way though Trailer Parks, Warehouses, Towns And a Power Plant, in this five-chapter Campaign taking place in Jasper County, SC It supports Singleplayer, Co-op, Versus, And Survival. Console Names: atr01_trailer_park atr02_outskirts atr03_town atr04_power_station atr05_plant Credits: Hsyenoh05 - Skybox for chapters 1-3 & 4, TM1566 - Color Correction for chapters 4-5, CastorJudo - Various Metal Textures The Rabbit - Frosted Glass Texture Royal Blood - Radio Song Play Testers - Warhawk, Konsta Starlight

item.description:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 8
FUEGO DE LEFT 1 ORIGINAL Y DAÑO PARA L4D2 AL ESTILO L4D1 TODAVIA FALTA POR TERMINAR ESTE TRABAJO PACIENCIA SE IRA ACTUALIZANDO Y DANDO INFORMES EN LA DESCRIPCIÓN

item.title: [ 5 Maps ] View of Hell
item.description:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 8
VIEW OF HELL CUSTOM CAMPAIGN You need to download part 2 for the campaign to work Campaign description: The survivors had a helicopter accident and crashed into a deserted area. Initially, they were not far from the airport, but when they arrived, they were too late. Their only escape was a cruise ship. They had heard that someone there might be the only hope of salvation. Credits: I did this campaign solo. I started working on it in 2022, but with breaks. Of course, the custom pieces were taken from other games like No More Room in Hell, Black Mesa, and CS:GO, and the models were from a sidekick I haven't contacted in a while. This is my fourth campaign. I don't know if I've learned anything over the years, but I've added more stuff since the last one, like this unrelenting morning.
item.content:encoded:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 8
VIEW OF HELL CUSTOM CAMPAIGN You need to download part 2 for the campaign to work Campaign description: The survivors had a helicopter accident and crashed into a deserted area. Initially, they were not far from the airport, but when they arrived, they were too late. Their only escape was a cruise ship. They had heard that someone there might be the only hope of salvation. Credits: I did this campaign solo. I started working on it in 2022, but with breaks. Of course, the custom pieces were taken from other games like No More Room in Hell, Black Mesa, and CS:GO, and the models were from a sidekick I haven't contacted in a while. This is my fourth campaign. I don't know if I've learned anything over the years, but I've added more stuff since the last one, like this unrelenting morning.

item.title: [ Mod ] UI Graphics Complete Fix
item.description:
View ArticleSteam Workshop
Media
Media gallery
1 / 5
After years of dealing with incorrect UI, you can finally make your game look more coherent! Alternate file sources: Steam Workshop

item.title: [ Mod ] Enhanced Weapons for UI Graphics Complete Fix
item.description:
View ArticleSteam WorkshopSteam Workshop 2
Media
Media gallery
1 / 1
A little consistency add-on for UI Graphics Complete Fix to match Definitive Vanilla Fixes & Improvements . Includes: • Slightly Revised Pistols (HUD icon) • Slightly Adjusted XM1014 (HUD icon and tip graphic) • Tweaked TLS M16 (Tip graphic) Alternate file sources: Steam Workshop
item.content:encoded:
View ArticleSteam WorkshopSteam Workshop 2
Media
Media gallery
1 / 1
A little consistency add-on for UI Graphics Complete Fix to match Definitive Vanilla Fixes & Improvements . Includes: • Slightly Revised Pistols (HUD icon) • Slightly Adjusted XM1014 (HUD icon and tip graphic) • Tweaked TLS M16 (Tip graphic) Alternate file sources: Steam Workshop
